title: Gautam Adani, Sagar Adani consent to $18 million penalty proposed by US market regulator to drop bribery case
description: The United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has proposed civil monetary penalties of $18 million against Gautam Adani and Sagar Adani in a case concerning false and misleading statements made in connection with a 2021 bond offering by Adani Green Energy Limited.The SEC has proposed a $6 million penalty against Gautam Adani and a $12 million penalty against Sagar Adani. These have been consented to by the Adanis without admitting or denying the allegations in the SEC complaint.The
